name: anonymized-identifier
trigger_level: consolidation pivot, with small acceptance buffer
failure_level: re-entry into consolidation on same or next session
stop_logic: below consolidation low minus volatility buffer; closing basis unless hard breach
kr_caveat: exclude opening (09:00-09:15) and closing auction (15:20-15:30) prints; void during sidecar / circuit-breaker

position_size_plan.size_up_rule: Add-on permitted only after stop migrates to breakeven and a fresh setup forms with its own trigger / failure / stop logic

thesis: Operator observes a multi-week tight consolidation with high-volume episode preceding the pivot; group context constructive.
counter_thesis: Group leadership thinning relative to last week; if leadership group breaks, this name is among the weakest by RS rank.
